hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.swift) if command -v swiftformat >/dev/null; then swiftformat "$f" --quiet; fi ;; esac; } || true

CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); case "$CMD" in *'git commit'*) ENG="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/Packages/EmbroideryEngine"; if [ -d "$ENG" ]; then OUT=$(cd "$ENG" && swift test 2>&1) || { echo 'Engine tests are red — commit blocked. Never commit failing engine tests (fix or finish the green phase first).' >&2; echo "$OUT" | tail -30 >&2; exit 2; }; fi ;; esac
